Method.desc: Load layouts, bind per-layout hotkeys, and initialise the chooser.
Method.doc:
Load layouts, bind per-layout hotkeys, and initialise the chooser.

Returns:
 * The WindowStow object
Method.name: start

Method.desc: Delete all hotkeys and destroy the chooser.
Method.doc:
Delete all hotkeys and destroy the chooser.

Returns:
 * The WindowStow object
Method.name: stop

Method.desc: Bind additional hotkeys such as showChooser.
Method.doc:
Bind additional hotkeys such as showChooser.

Parameters:
 * map - A table with optional keys: showChooser, tileAll, maximizeAll, unhideAll, cascadeWindows, saveLayout, deleteLayout

Returns:
 * The WindowStow object
Method.name: bindHotkeys

Method.doc:
Apply a named layout immediately.

Parameters:
 * name - String name of the layout to apply
Method.name: applyLayout
parameters: * name - String name of the layout

Method.desc: Arrange windows in a diagonal cascade from top-left to bottom-right.
Method.doc:
Arrange windows in a diagonal cascade from top-left to bottom-right.

Parameters:
 * wins - Array of hs.window objects to cascade

Returns:
 * The WindowStow object
Method.name: cascadeWindows

Method.desc: Show a toggle-based chooser to select which windows to cascade.
Method.doc:
Show a toggle-based chooser to select which windows to cascade.

Parameters:
 * selected - (optional) Table of {[windowId]=bool} for pre-selected windows
Method.name: showCascadeChooser
parameters: * selected - (optional) Table of window ID → bool

Method.desc: Reload layout files from layouts_dir and rebind per-layout hotkeys.
Method.doc: Reload layout files from layouts_dir and rebind per-layout hotkeys.
Method.name: reloadConfig

Variable.desc: Directory containing *.lua layout files. Defaults to hs.configdir .. '/layouts'.
Variable.doc: Directory containing *.lua layout files. Defaults to hs.configdir .. '/layouts'.
Variable.name: layouts_dir

Variable.desc: Stagger amount in pixels for Cascade Windows. nil = auto-compute based on screen width.
Variable.doc: Stagger amount in pixels for Cascade Windows. nil = auto-compute based on screen width (clamped 20-60px).
Variable.name: cascadeStagger

doc: Window layout manager for Hammerspoon. Define layouts as individual Lua files and apply them via hotkeys or a chooser menu. Includes built-in actions: Tile All, Maximize All, Unhide All, Cascade Windows, Save/Delete layouts.
name: WindowStow
